channel.title: bgramaje | Blog
channel.description: Blog posts by Borja Gramaje on software engineering, IoT, and data platforms.

item.title: How I track what gets read (and what doesn’t) with Umami
item.description: My workflow for measuring which content works on the site and spotting posts people drop early, using Umami.

item.title: Cómo monitorizo qué se lee (y qué no) con Umami
item.description: Mi flujo para medir qué contenidos funcionan en la web y detectar posts que se abandonan pronto usando Umami.

item.title: PARCAR-IoT: LoRaWAN node for public parking with remote management
item.description: Low-power device (ESP32-S3 + SX1262 + ultrasonic sensors + e-ink) integrated with ChirpStack to monitor occupancy and enable dynamic use cases for public parking spaces.
